## v1.0.13 — Standalone Setup Hub bundled in installer

### Standalone Setup Hub tool
- **`setup-hub.exe`** — separate All-in-One Setup Hub app (not the full studio UI)
- **Auto scan + install** on launch — installs all managed addons under `%APPDATA%\AI Video Creator\addons`
- **Bundled in NSIS installer** — copied to install folder alongside the main app

### Installer behavior
- After install finishes, **Setup Hub launches automatically** (instead of the main app)
- **Start Menu + Desktop shortcuts** for Setup Hub
- Main app shortcut unchanged — open studio after setup completes via **Open AI Video Creator** in Setup Hub

### In-app Setup Hub
- Main app now **scans only on launch** (no duplicate auto-install); use the standalone tool or enable auto-update in the panel

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
